global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call to action and brand name.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure service with a clear price and call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, rounded rectangle with a soft blue background, providing a subtle backdrop for the text.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A medium-sized, rounded rectangle with a light blue color, positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A medium-sized, rounded rectangle with a light blue color, slightly overlapping with another element.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A medium-sized, rounded rectangle with a light blue color, positioned centrally and overlapping with other elements.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A small, rounded rectangle with a soft blue background, positioned towards the top of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: A small circle with a light blue color, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with bold white text on a blue background, encouraging users to 'Order now'.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple No hidden fees €19.99 Order now

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: A large, bold text displaying 'VaultRun' in a dark font, positioned at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centrally positioned, and the CTA is at the bottom.
